steps.title: Identify the goal
steps.content: The student wants to explain an advantage of the Oak Tree House dwelling site. The relevant note: The overhanging rock ledges offered protection from heavy rain and snow.

steps.title: Match the choice
steps.content:
Choice D: Since it was built under a rock overhang, Oak Tree House was naturally protected from heavy rain and snow. This explicitly states an advantage of the site.

A asserts an advantage but doesn't explain it. B gives location and dates without an advantage. C describes Yucca House's advantage, not Oak Tree House's.

That matches choice D — D is correct.
